content.full_text:
California Fair Political Practices Commission

July 19, 1990

James F. Wilburn  
7159 N. Fruit Ave.  
Fresno, CA 93711-0740

Re: Your Request for Informal Assistance  
Our File No. G-90-397

Dear Mr. Wilburn:

You have requested advice concerning certain actions of the members of the Citizen Advisory Committee, a committee established by the Fresno City Council. You state that the Citizen Advisory Committee failed to follow parliamentary procedure on May 21, 1990, and failed to publish records of the meeting and release them for public inspection. You also contend that the presiding officer and parliamentarian lacked impartiality. You attached supporting materials describing the functions and activities of the Citizen Advisory Committee.

A review of these materials indicates that your request does not present a question under the Political Reform Act (the "Act").1 Therefore, since our jurisdiction extends only to matters covered by the Act, we cannot provide you with assistance regarding these matters.

I am sorry we are unable to provide you with the advice you seek. If you have any questions concerning the Act, please contact me at (916) 322-5901.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin  
Acting General Counsel

By: Peggy Bernardy  
Counsel, Legal Division

SH:PB:plh

1 Government Code Sections 81000-91015. All statutory references are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated. Commission regulations appear at 2 California Code of Regulations Section 18000, et seq. All references to regulations are to Title 2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations.
